intro: Harum (meaning elevated or high) was a descendant of Judah listed in the tribal genealogy of 1 Chronicles 4:8 as a member of the family of Koz. The genealogy connects him to the line of Judah through Haahashtari and Naarah, within the extended genealogical register that Chronicles provides for the leading families of Judah. Beyond this genealogical reference, nothing further is recorded about him in the biblical text.
